inputs.label: Effective Exhaust Velocity
inputs.businessContext: Velocity of exhaust gases relative to the rocket, typically 2000-4500 m/s for chemical rockets.

businessContext_i18n.en: Velocity of exhaust gases relative to the rocket, typically 2000-4500 m/s for chemical rockets.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Egzoz gazlarının rokete göre hızı, kimyasal roketler için tipik olarak 2000-4500 m/s.
businessContext_i18n.de: Geschwindigkeit der Abgase relativ zur Rakete, typischerweise 2000-4500 m/s für chemische Raketen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Vitesse des gaz d'échappement par rapport à la fusée, typiquement 2000-4500 m/s pour les fusées chimiques.

inputs.label: Initial Mass
inputs.businessContext: Total mass of the rocket at launch including propellant.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total mass of the rocket at launch including propellant.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Roketin fırlatma anındaki toplam kütlesi (yakıt dahil).
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtmasse der Rakete beim Start einschließlich Treibstoff.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Masse totale de la fusée au lancement, y compris le propergol.

inputs.label: Final Mass
inputs.businessContext: Mass of the rocket after propellant is burned, excluding any discarded stages.

businessContext_i18n.en: Mass of the rocket after propellant is burned, excluding any discarded stages.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yakıt yandıktan sonra roketin kütlesi, atılan aşamalar hariç.
businessContext_i18n.de: Masse der Rakete nach dem Verbrennen des Treibstoffs, ohne ausgestoßene Stufen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Masse de la fusée après combustion du propergol, sans les étages largués.

inputs.label: Safety Factor
inputs.businessContext: Design safety factor applied to delta-V calculation, normally 1.0 (no margin).

businessContext_i18n.en: Design safety factor applied to delta-V calculation, normally 1.0 (no margin).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Delta-V hesaplamasına uygulanan tasarım güvenlik faktörü, normalde 1.0 (marj yok).
businessContext_i18n.de: Auslegungssicherheitsfaktor für die Delta-V-Berechnung, normalerweise 1,0 (keine Reserve).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coefficient de sécurité de conception appliqué au calcul du delta-V, normalement 1,0 (sans marge).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
